Canada's Trades Career Agent

a fair shot.

Speak your experience. Get matched to jobs. Know if you're being underpaid. No resume required.

Trades jobs unfilled in Canada

To build your profile

100%

Free for workers

Built different.
Because the trades workforce deserves better.

Just speak

No resume. No forms. Tell us who you are in your own words.

Know your worth

We flag every job that underpays you against real market rates.

Built for you

Not for recruiters. Not for HR. For the worker on the job site.

Any language

Speak in English, Spanish, Punjabi — TradePass understands.

that pays what you're worth?
